problem id: ca8d32e6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11101101 -> 00101110
  01001100 -> 01101100
  10011000 -> 11011001
  01011000 -> 11101101
  10000100 -> 01011110
  11000011 -> 01101111
  10010100 -> 01011011
  10000111 -> 11111110

query: 11001110
predicted answer: 10001100
